62	
63	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserChatRequest):
64	            raise AttributeError(
65	                f"user_request should be of type "
66	                f"UserChatRequest for OpenAIUser.chat, got "
67	                f"{type(user_request)}"
68	            )
69	
70	        if isinstance(user_request, UserImageChatRequest):
71	            text_content = [{"type": "text", "text": user_request.prompt}]
72	            image_content = [
73	                {
74	                    "type": "image_url",
75	                    "image_url": {"url": image},
76	                }
77	                for image in user_request.image_content
78	            ]
79	            content = text_content + image_content
80	        else:
81	            # Backward compatibility for vLLM versions prior to v0.5.1.
82	            # OpenAI API used a different text prompt format before
83	            # multi-modality model support.
84	            content = user_request.prompt
85	
86	        # Build messages array with optional system message
87	        messages = self.build_messages(user_request, content)
88	
89	        # Filter out keys that shouldn't be spread into payload
90	        filtered_params = {
91	            k: v
92	            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
93	            if k not in ["system_message", "messages", "temperature"]
94	        }
95	
96	        payload = {
97	            "model": user_request.model,
98	            "messages": messages,
99	            "max_tokens": user_request.max_tokens,
100	            "temperature": user_request.additional_request_params.get(
101	                "temperature", 0.0
102	            ),
103	            "stream": True,
104	            "stream_options": {
105	                "include_usage": True,
106	            },
107	            **filtered_params,
108	        }
109	
110	        # Conditionally add ignore_eos for vLLM and SGLang backends
111	        if self.api_backend in ["vllm", "sglang"]:
112	            payload.setdefault("ignore_eos", bool(user_request.max_tokens))
113	        else:
114	            # Remove ignore_eos for OpenAI backend, as it is not supported
115	            payload.pop("ignore_eos", None)
116	
117	        self.send_request(
118	            True,
119	            endpoint,
120	            payload,
121	            self.parse_chat_response,
122	            user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
123	        )
124	
125	    def build_messages(self, user_request: UserChatRequest, content) -> list:
126	        """Build messages array with optional system message support."""
127	        messages = []
128	
129	        # Add system message if provided
130	        system_message = user_request.additional_request_params.get("system_message")
131	        if system_message:
132	            messages.append(
133	                {
134	                    "role": "system",
135	                    "content": system_message,
136	                }
137	            )
138	
139	        # Add current user message
140	        messages.append(
141	            {
142	                "role": "user",
143	                "content": content,
144	            }
145	        )
146	
147	        return messages
148	
149	    @staticmethod
150	    def _get_reasoning_content_chunk(delta: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[str]:
151	        reasoning = delta.get("reasoning")
152	        reasoning_content = delta.get("reasoning_content")
153	
154	        if reasoning and reasoning_content and reasoning != reasoning_content:
155	            warning_once(
156	                logger,
157	                "conflicting_reasoning_fields",
158	                "Streaming chunk included both reasoning and reasoning_content "
159	                "with different values. Using reasoning and ignoring "
160	                "reasoning_content to avoid double counting.",
161	            )
162	
163	        return reasoning or reasoning_content
164	
165	    @task
166	    def embeddings(self):
167	        endpoint = "/v1/embeddings"
168	
169	        user_request = self.sample()
170	
171	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserEmbeddingRequest):
172	            raise AttributeError(
173	                f"user_request should be of type "
174	                f"UserEmbeddingRequest for OpenAIUser."
175	                f"embeddings, got {type(user_request)}"
176	            )
177	
178	        random.shuffle(user_request.documents)
179	        payload = {
180	            "model": user_request.model,
181	            "input": user_request.documents,
182	            "encoding_format": user_request.additional_request_params.get(
183	                "encoding_format", "float"
184	            ),
185	            **user_request.additional_request_params,
186	        }
187	        self.send_request(False, endpoint, payload, self.parse_embedding_response)
188	
189	    @task
190	    def rerank(self):
191	        endpoint = "/v1/rerank"
192	
193	        user_request = self.sample()
194	
195	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserReRankRequest):
196	            raise AttributeError(
197	                f"user_request should be of type "
198	                f"UserReRankRequest for OpenAIUser.rerank, "
199	                f"got {type(user_request)}"
200	            )
201	
202	        payload = {
203	            "model": user_request.model,
204	            "query": user_request.query,
205	            "documents": user_request.documents,
206	            **user_request.additional_request_params,
207	        }
208	
209	        self.send_request(
210	            False,
211	            endpoint,
212	            payload,
213	            self.parse_rerank_response,
214	            user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
215	        )
216	
217	    @task
218	    def images_generations(self):
219	        endpoint = "/v1/images/generations"
220	
221	        user_request = self.sample()
222	
223	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserImageGenerationRequest):
224	            raise AttributeError(
225	                f"user_request should be of type "
226	                f"UserImageGenerationRequest for OpenAIUser."
227	                f"images_generations, got {type(user_request)}"
228	            )
229	
230	        # Filter keys already set explicitly in the payload
231	        filtered_params = {
232	            k: v
233	            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
234	            if k not in ("model", "prompt", "n", "size", "quality")
235	        }
236	        payload = {
237	            "model": user_request.model,
238	            "prompt": user_request.prompt,
239	            "n": user_request.num_images,
240	            **filtered_params,
241	        }
242	        if user_request.size is not None:
243	            payload["size"] = user_request.size
244	        if user_request.quality is not None:
245	            payload["quality"] = user_request.quality
246	        self.send_request(
247	            False, endpoint, payload, self.parse_images_generations_response
248	        )
249	
250	    @task
251	    def speech(self):
252	        endpoint = "/v1/audio/speech"
253	        user_request = self.sample()
254	
255	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserTextToSpeechRequest):
256	            raise AttributeError(
257	                f"user_request should be of type "
258	                f"UserTextToSpeechRequest for OpenAIUser.speech, got "
259	                f"{type(user_request)}"
260	            )
261	
262	        filtered_params = {
263	            k: v
264	            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
265	            if k not in ("model", "input", "voice")
266	        }
267	
268	        payload = {
269	            "model": user_request.model,
270	            "input": user_request.input_text,
271	            "voice": user_request.voice,
272	            **filtered_params,
273	        }
274	
275	        self.send_request(True, endpoint, payload, self.parse_speech_response)
276	
277	    @staticmethod
278	    def parse_speech_response(
279	        response: Response,
280	        start_time: float,
281	        _: Optional[int],
282	        __: float,
283	    ) -> UserTextToSpeechResponse:
284	        time_at_first_token = None
285	        total_bytes = 0
286	        for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=1024):
287	            if time_at_first_token is None:
288	                time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
289	            total_bytes += len(chunk)
290	        end_time = time.monotonic()
291	
292	        if time_at_first_token is None:
293	            logger.warning("TTS response returned 200 but empty audio body")
294	            time_at_first_token = end_time
295	
296	        logger.debug(
297	            f"TTS response: audio_bytes={total_bytes}, "
298	            f"content_type={response.headers.get('content-type')}, "
299	            f"ttft={time_at_first_token - start_time:.3f}s, "
300	            f"e2e_latency={end_time - start_time:.3f}s"
301	        )
302	        return UserTextToSpeechResponse(
303	            status_code=200,
304	            start_time=start_time,
305	            end_time=end_time,
306	            time_at_first_token=time_at_first_token,
307	            num_prefill_tokens=0,
308	            audio_bytes=total_bytes,
309	        )
310	
311	    def send_request(
312	        self,
313	        stream: bool,
314	        endpoint: str,
315	        payload: Dict[str, Any],
316	        parse_strategy: Callable[..., UserResponse],
317	        num_prefill_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
318	    ) -> UserResponse:
319	        """
320	        Sends a POST request, handling both streaming and non-streaming
321	        responses.
322	
323	        Args:
324	            endpoint (str): The API endpoint.
325	            payload (Dict[str, Any]): The JSON payload for the request.
326	            stream (bool): Whether to stream the response.
327	            parse_strategy (Callable[[Response, float], UserResponse]):
328	                The function to parse the response.
329	            num_prefill_tokens (Optional[int]): The num of tokens in the
330	                prefill/prompt. Only need for streaming requests.
331	
332	        Returns:
333	            UserResponse: A response object containing status and metrics data.
334	        """
335	        response = None
336	
337	        try:
338	            start_time = time.monotonic()
339	            response = requests.post(
340	                url=f"{self.host}{endpoint}",
341	                json=payload,
342	                stream=stream,
343	                headers=self.headers,
344	            )
345	            non_stream_post_end_time = time.monotonic()
346	
347	            if response.status_code == 200:
348	                metrics_response = parse_strategy(
349	                    response,
350	                    start_time,
351	                    num_prefill_tokens,
352	                    non_stream_post_end_time,
353	                )
354	            else:
355	                metrics_response = UserResponse(
356	                    status_code=response.status_code,
357	                    error_message=response.text,
358	                )
359	        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError as e:
360	            metrics_response = UserResponse(
361	                status_code=503, error_message=f"Connection error: {e}"
362	            )
363	        except requests.exceptions.Timeout as e:
364	            metrics_response = UserResponse(
365	                status_code=408, error_message=f"Request timed out: {e}"
366	            )
367	        except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
368	            metrics_response = UserResponse(
369	                status_code=500,  # Assign a generic 500
370	                error_message=str(e),
371	            )
372	        finally:
373	            if response is not None:
374	                response.close()
375	
376	        self.collect_metrics(metrics_response, endpoint)
377	        return metrics_response
378	
379	    def parse_chat_response(
380	        self,
381	        response: Response,
382	        start_time: float,
383	        num_prefill_tokens: int,
384	        _: float,
385	    ) -> UserResponse:
386	        """
387	        Parses a streaming response.
388	
389	        Args:
390	            response (Response): The response object.
391	            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
392	            num_prefill_tokens (int): The num of tokens in the prefill/prompt.
393	            _ (float): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep parse_*_response
394	                have the same interface.
395	
396	        Returns:
397	            UserChatResponse: A response object with metrics and generated text.
398	        """
399	        end_chunk = b"[DONE]"
400	
401	        generated_text = ""
402	        reasoning_text = ""
403	        tokens_received = 0
404	        time_at_first_token = None
405	        finish_reason = None
406	        previous_data = None
407	        num_prompt_tokens = None
408	        reasoning_tokens = None
409	        for chunk in response.iter_lines(chunk_size=None):
410	            # Caution: Adding logs here can make debug mode unusable.
411	            chunk = chunk.strip()
412	
413	            if not chunk:
414	                continue
415	
416	            if chunk.startswith(b"data: "):
417	                chunk = chunk[6:]
418	            elif chunk.startswith(b"data:"):
419	                chunk = chunk[5:]
420	            else:
421	                continue
422	
423	            if chunk == end_chunk:
424	                break
425	
426	            data = json.loads(chunk)
427	
428	            # Handle streaming error response as OpenAI API server handles it
429	            # differently. Some might return 200 first and generate error response
430	            # later in the chunk
431	            if data.get("error") is not None:
432	                return UserResponse(
433	                    status_code=data["error"].get("code", -1),
434	                    error_message=data["error"].get(
435	                        "message", "Unknown error, please check server logs"
436	                    ),
437	                )
438	
439	            # Standard OpenAI API streams include "finish_reason"
440	            # in the second-to-last chunk,
441	            # followed by "usage" in the final chunk,
442	            # which does not contain "finish_reason"
443	            if (
444	                not data["choices"]
445	                and finish_reason
446	                and "usage" in data
447	                and data["usage"]
448	            ):
449	                (
450	                    num_prefill_tokens,
451	                    num_prompt_tokens,
452	                    tokens_received,
453	                    reasoning_tokens,
454	                ) = self._get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens)
455	                # Additional check for time_at_first_token when the response is
456	                # too short
457	                if not time_at_first_token:
458	                    tokens_received = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens", 0)
459	                    if tokens_received > 1:
460	                        logger.warning(
461	                            f"🚨🚨🚨 The first chunk the server returned "
462	                            f"has >1 tokens: {tokens_received}. It will "
463	                            f"affect the accuracy of time_at_first_token!"
464	                        )
465	                        time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
466	                    else:
467	                        raise Exception(
468	                            "Invalid streaming response: "
469	                            "received final usage chunk "
470	                            "with completion_tokens="
471	                            f"{tokens_received}, but no "
472	                            "content was delivered during "
473	                            "streaming (time_at_first_token"
474	                            " was never set). This typically"
475	                            " means the model returned an "
476	                            "empty response. Raw usage "
477	                            f"data: {data.get('usage')}"
478	                        )
479	                break
480	
481	            try:
482	                delta = data["choices"][0]["delta"]
483	                content = delta.get("content")
484	                reasoning_content_chunk = self._get_reasoning_content_chunk(delta)
485	                content = content or reasoning_content_chunk
486	                usage = delta.get("usage")
487	
488	                if usage:
489	                    tokens_received = usage["completion_tokens"]
490	                if content:
491	                    if not time_at_first_token:
492	                        if tokens_received > 1:
493	                            logger.warning(
494	                                f"🚨🚨🚨 The first chunk the server returned "
495	                                f"has >1 tokens: {tokens_received}. It will "
496	                                f"affect the accuracy of time_at_first_token!"
497	                            )
498	                        time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
499	                    generated_text += content
500	                if reasoning_content_chunk:
501	                    reasoning_text += reasoning_content_chunk
502	
503	                finish_reason = data["choices"][0].get("finish_reason", None)
504	
505	                # SGLang v0.4.3 to v0.4.7 has finish_reason and usage
506	                # in the last chunk
507	                if finish_reason and "usage" in data and data["usage"]:
508	                    (
509	                        num_prefill_tokens,
510	                        num_prompt_tokens,
511	                        tokens_received,
512	                        reasoning_tokens,
513	                    ) = self._get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens)
514	                    break
515	
516	            except (IndexError, KeyError) as e:
517	                logger.warning(
518	                    f"Error processing chunk: {e}, data: {data}, "
519	                    f"previous_data: {previous_data}, "
520	                    f"finish_reason: {finish_reason}, skipping"
521	                )
522	
523	            previous_data = data
524	
525	        end_time = time.monotonic()
526	        logger.debug(
527	            f"Generated text: {generated_text} \n"
528	            f"Time at first token: {time_at_first_token} \n"
529	            f"Finish reason: {finish_reason}\n"
530	            f"Prompt Tokens: {num_prompt_tokens} \n"
531	            f"Completion Tokens: {tokens_received}\n"
532	            f"Start Time: {start_time}\n"
533	            f"End Time: {end_time}"
534	        )
535	
536	        if not tokens_received:
537	            tokens_received = self.environment.sampler.get_token_length(
538	                generated_text, add_special_tokens=False
539	            )
540	            warning_once(
541	                logger,
542	                "tokens_received_estimated",
543	                "🚨🚨🚨 There is no usage info returned from the model "
544	                "server. Estimated tokens_received based on the model "
545	                "tokenizer.",
546	            )
547	        # If reasoning_tokens is not provided by the server,
548	        # fall back to estimating it from reasoning_content.
549	        if (not reasoning_tokens) and len(reasoning_text) > 0:
550	            reasoning_tokens = self.environment.sampler.get_token_length(
551	                reasoning_text, add_special_tokens=False
552	            )
553	            warning_once(
554	                logger,
555	                "reasoning_tokens_estimated",
556	                "🚨🚨🚨 Server did not report reasoning_tokens. Estimated "
557	                "reasoning_tokens based on the model tokenizer.",
558	            )
559	        return UserChatResponse(
560	            status_code=200,
561	            generated_text=generated_text,
562	            tokens_received=tokens_received,
563	            time_at_first_token=time_at_first_token,
564	            num_prefill_tokens=num_prefill_tokens,
565	            start_time=start_time,
566	            end_time=end_time,
567	            reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens,
568	        )
569	
570	    @staticmethod
571	    def _get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens):
572	        num_prompt_tokens = data["usage"].get("prompt_tokens")
573	        tokens_received = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens", 0)
574	        details = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens_details") or {}
575	        reasoning_tokens = details.get("reasoning_tokens")
576	        # For vision task
577	        if num_prefill_tokens is None:
578	            # use num_prompt_tokens as prefill to cover image tokens
579	            num_prefill_tokens = num_prompt_tokens
580	        # Prefer server-reported prompt token count, fall back to local
581	        effective_prefill = (
582	            num_prompt_tokens if num_prompt_tokens is not None else num_prefill_tokens
583	        )
584	        return effective_prefill, num_prompt_tokens, tokens_received, reasoning_tokens
585	
586	    @staticmethod
587	    def parse_embedding_response(
588	        response: Response, start_time: float, _: Optional[int], end_time: float
589	    ) -> UserResponse:
590	        """
591	        Parses a non-streaming response.
592	
593	        Args:
594	            response (Response): The response object.
595	            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
596	            _ (Optional[int]): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep
597	                parse_*_response have the same interface.
598	            end_time(float): The time when the request was finished.
599	
600	        Returns:
601	            UserResponse: A response object with metrics.
602	        """
603	
604	        data = response.json()
605	        num_prompt_tokens = data["usage"]["prompt_tokens"]
606	
607	        return UserResponse(
608	            status_code=200,
609	            start_time=start_time,
610	            end_time=end_time,
611	            time_at_first_token=end_time,
612	            num_prefill_tokens=num_prompt_tokens,
613	        )
614	
615	    @staticmethod
616	    def parse_rerank_response(
617	        response: Response,
618	        start_time: float,
619	        num_prefill_tokens: Optional[int],
620	        end_time: float,
621	    ) -> UserResponse:
622	        """
623	        Parses a rerank response from vLLM/SGLang backends.
624	
625	        Args:
626	            response (Response): The response object.
627	            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
628	            num_prefill_tokens (Optional[int]): Number of tokens in the request.
629	            end_time (float): The time when the request was finished.
630	
631	        Returns:
632	            UserResponse: A response object with metrics.
633	        """
634	        data = response.json()
635	
636	        if "usage" in data and data["usage"]:
637	            num_prefill_tokens, _, _, _ = OpenAIUser._get_usage_info(
638	                data, num_prefill_tokens
639	            )
640	
641	        return UserResponse(
642	            status_code=200,
643	            start_time=start_time,
644	            end_time=end_time,
645	            time_at_first_token=end_time,
646	            num_prefill_tokens=num_prefill_tokens or 0,
647	        )
648	
649	    @staticmethod
650	    def parse_images_generations_response(
651	        response: Response, start_time: float, _: Optional[int], end_time: float
652	    ) -> UserImageGenerationResponse:
653	        """
654	        Parses an image generation response.
655	
656	        Args:
657	            response (Response): The response object.
658	            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
659	            _ (Optional[int]): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep
660	                parse_*_response have the same interface.
661	            end_time(float): The time when the request was finished.
662	
663	        Returns:
664	            UserImageGenerationResponse: A response object with generated images.
665	        """
666	
667	        data = response.json()
668	        image_data = data.get("data", [])
669	        generated_images = [
670	            img.get("url") or img.get("b64_json", "") for img in image_data
671	        ]
672	        revised_prompt = image_data[0].get("revised_prompt") if image_data else None
673	
674	        return UserImageGenerationResponse(
675	            status_code=response.status_code,
676	            start_time=start_time,
677	            end_time=end_time,
678	            time_at_first_token=end_time,
679	            generated_images=generated_images,
680	            revised_prompt=revised_prompt,
681	            num_prefill_tokens=0,
682	            images_generated=len(generated_images),
683	        )
684

file.content:
"""Customized user for OpenAI backends."""

from locust import task

import json
import random
import time
from typing import Any, Callable, Dict, Optional

import requests
from requests import Response

from genai_bench.auth.model_auth_provider import ModelAuthProvider
from genai_bench.logging import init_logger, warning_once
from genai_bench.protocol import (
    UserChatRequest,
    UserChatResponse,
    UserEmbeddingRequest,
    UserImageChatRequest,
    UserImageGenerationRequest,
    UserImageGenerationResponse,
    UserReRankRequest,
    UserResponse,
    UserTextToSpeechRequest,
    UserTextToSpeechResponse,
)
from genai_bench.user.base_user import BaseUser

logger = init_logger(__name__)


class OpenAIUser(BaseUser):
    BACKEND_NAME = "openai"
    supported_tasks = {
        "text-to-text": "chat",
        "image-text-to-text": "chat",
        "text-to-embeddings": "embeddings",
        "text-to-rerank": "rerank",
        "text-to-image": "images_generations",
        "text-to-speech": "speech",
    }

    host: Optional[str] = None
    auth_provider: Optional[ModelAuthProvider] = None
    headers = None

    def on_start(self):
        if not self.host or not self.auth_provider:
            raise ValueError("API key and base must be set for OpenAIUser.")
        auth_headers = self.auth_provider.get_headers()
        self.headers = {
            **auth_headers,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
        }
        self.api_backend = getattr(self, "api_backend", self.BACKEND_NAME)
        super().on_start()

    @task
    def chat(self):
        endpoint = "/v1/chat/completions"
        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserChatRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserChatRequest for OpenAIUser.chat, got "
                f"{type(user_request)}"
            )

        if isinstance(user_request, UserImageChatRequest):
            text_content = [{"type": "text", "text": user_request.prompt}]
            image_content = [
                {
                    "type": "image_url",
                    "image_url": {"url": image},
                }
                for image in user_request.image_content
            ]
            content = text_content + image_content
        else:
            # Backward compatibility for vLLM versions prior to v0.5.1.
            # OpenAI API used a different text prompt format before
            # multi-modality model support.
            content = user_request.prompt

        # Build messages array with optional system message
        messages = self.build_messages(user_request, content)

        # Filter out keys that shouldn't be spread into payload
        filtered_params = {
            k: v
            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
            if k not in ["system_message", "messages", "temperature"]
        }

        payload = {
            "model": user_request.model,
            "messages": messages,
            "max_tokens": user_request.max_tokens,
            "temperature": user_request.additional_request_params.get(
                "temperature", 0.0
            ),
            "stream": True,
            "stream_options": {
                "include_usage": True,
            },
            **filtered_params,
        }

        # Conditionally add ignore_eos for vLLM and SGLang backends
        if self.api_backend in ["vllm", "sglang"]:
            payload.setdefault("ignore_eos", bool(user_request.max_tokens))
        else:
            # Remove ignore_eos for OpenAI backend, as it is not supported
            payload.pop("ignore_eos", None)

        self.send_request(
            True,
            endpoint,
            payload,
            self.parse_chat_response,
            user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
        )

    def build_messages(self, user_request: UserChatRequest, content) -> list:
        """Build messages array with optional system message support."""
        messages = []

        # Add system message if provided
        system_message = user_request.additional_request_params.get("system_message")
        if system_message:
            messages.append(
                {
                    "role": "system",
                    "content": system_message,
                }
            )

        # Add current user message
        messages.append(
            {
                "role": "user",
                "content": content,
            }
        )

        return messages

    @staticmethod
    def _get_reasoning_content_chunk(delta: Dict[str, Any]) -> Optional[str]:
        reasoning = delta.get("reasoning")
        reasoning_content = delta.get("reasoning_content")

        if reasoning and reasoning_content and reasoning != reasoning_content:
            warning_once(
                logger,
                "conflicting_reasoning_fields",
                "Streaming chunk included both reasoning and reasoning_content "
                "with different values. Using reasoning and ignoring "
                "reasoning_content to avoid double counting.",
            )

        return reasoning or reasoning_content

    @task
    def embeddings(self):
        endpoint = "/v1/embeddings"

        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserEmbeddingRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserEmbeddingRequest for OpenAIUser."
                f"embeddings, got {type(user_request)}"
            )

        random.shuffle(user_request.documents)
        payload = {
            "model": user_request.model,
            "input": user_request.documents,
            "encoding_format": user_request.additional_request_params.get(
                "encoding_format", "float"
            ),
            **user_request.additional_request_params,
        }
        self.send_request(False, endpoint, payload, self.parse_embedding_response)

    @task
    def rerank(self):
        endpoint = "/v1/rerank"

        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserReRankRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserReRankRequest for OpenAIUser.rerank, "
                f"got {type(user_request)}"
            )

        payload = {
            "model": user_request.model,
            "query": user_request.query,
            "documents": user_request.documents,
            **user_request.additional_request_params,
        }

        self.send_request(
            False,
            endpoint,
            payload,
            self.parse_rerank_response,
            user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
        )

    @task
    def images_generations(self):
        endpoint = "/v1/images/generations"

        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserImageGenerationRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserImageGenerationRequest for OpenAIUser."
                f"images_generations, got {type(user_request)}"
            )

        # Filter keys already set explicitly in the payload
        filtered_params = {
            k: v
            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
            if k not in ("model", "prompt", "n", "size", "quality")
        }
        payload = {
            "model": user_request.model,
            "prompt": user_request.prompt,
            "n": user_request.num_images,
            **filtered_params,
        }
        if user_request.size is not None:
            payload["size"] = user_request.size
        if user_request.quality is not None:
            payload["quality"] = user_request.quality
        self.send_request(
            False, endpoint, payload, self.parse_images_generations_response
        )

    @task
    def speech(self):
        endpoint = "/v1/audio/speech"
        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserTextToSpeechRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserTextToSpeechRequest for OpenAIUser.speech, got "
                f"{type(user_request)}"
            )

        filtered_params = {
            k: v
            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
            if k not in ("model", "input", "voice")
        }

        payload = {
            "model": user_request.model,
            "input": user_request.input_text,
            "voice": user_request.voice,
            **filtered_params,
        }

        self.send_request(True, endpoint, payload, self.parse_speech_response)

    @staticmethod
    def parse_speech_response(
        response: Response,
        start_time: float,
        _: Optional[int],
        __: float,
    ) -> UserTextToSpeechResponse:
        time_at_first_token = None
        total_bytes = 0
        for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=1024):
            if time_at_first_token is None:
                time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
            total_bytes += len(chunk)
        end_time = time.monotonic()

        if time_at_first_token is None:
            logger.warning("TTS response returned 200 but empty audio body")
            time_at_first_token = end_time

        logger.debug(
            f"TTS response: audio_bytes={total_bytes}, "
            f"content_type={response.headers.get('content-type')}, "
            f"ttft={time_at_first_token - start_time:.3f}s, "
            f"e2e_latency={end_time - start_time:.3f}s"
        )
        return UserTextToSpeechResponse(
            status_code=200,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            time_at_first_token=time_at_first_token,
            num_prefill_tokens=0,
            audio_bytes=total_bytes,
        )

    def send_request(
        self,
        stream: bool,
        endpoint: str,
        payload: Dict[str, Any],
        parse_strategy: Callable[..., UserResponse],
        num_prefill_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
    ) -> UserResponse:
        """
        Sends a POST request, handling both streaming and non-streaming
        responses.

        Args:
            endpoint (str): The API endpoint.
            payload (Dict[str, Any]): The JSON payload for the request.
            stream (bool): Whether to stream the response.
            parse_strategy (Callable[[Response, float], UserResponse]):
                The function to parse the response.
            num_prefill_tokens (Optional[int]): The num of tokens in the
                prefill/prompt. Only need for streaming requests.

        Returns:
            UserResponse: A response object containing status and metrics data.
        """
        response = None

        try:
            start_time = time.monotonic()
            response = requests.post(
                url=f"{self.host}{endpoint}",
                json=payload,
                stream=stream,
                headers=self.headers,
            )
            non_stream_post_end_time = time.monotonic()

            if response.status_code == 200:
                metrics_response = parse_strategy(
                    response,
                    start_time,
                    num_prefill_tokens,
                    non_stream_post_end_time,
                )
            else:
                metrics_response = UserResponse(
                    status_code=response.status_code,
                    error_message=response.text,
                )
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError as e:
            metrics_response = UserResponse(
                status_code=503, error_message=f"Connection error: {e}"
            )
        except requests.exceptions.Timeout as e:
            metrics_response = UserResponse(
                status_code=408, error_message=f"Request timed out: {e}"
            )
        except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e:
            metrics_response = UserResponse(
                status_code=500,  # Assign a generic 500
                error_message=str(e),
            )
        finally:
            if response is not None:
                response.close()

        self.collect_metrics(metrics_response, endpoint)
        return metrics_response

    def parse_chat_response(
        self,
        response: Response,
        start_time: float,
        num_prefill_tokens: int,
        _: float,
    ) -> UserResponse:
        """
        Parses a streaming response.

        Args:
            response (Response): The response object.
            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
            num_prefill_tokens (int): The num of tokens in the prefill/prompt.
            _ (float): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep parse_*_response
                have the same interface.

        Returns:
            UserChatResponse: A response object with metrics and generated text.
        """
        end_chunk = b"[DONE]"

        generated_text = ""
        reasoning_text = ""
        tokens_received = 0
        time_at_first_token = None
        finish_reason = None
        previous_data = None
        num_prompt_tokens = None
        reasoning_tokens = None
        for chunk in response.iter_lines(chunk_size=None):
            # Caution: Adding logs here can make debug mode unusable.
            chunk = chunk.strip()

            if not chunk:
                continue

            if chunk.startswith(b"data: "):
                chunk = chunk[6:]
            elif chunk.startswith(b"data:"):
                chunk = chunk[5:]
            else:
                continue

            if chunk == end_chunk:
                break

            data = json.loads(chunk)

            # Handle streaming error response as OpenAI API server handles it
            # differently. Some might return 200 first and generate error response
            # later in the chunk
            if data.get("error") is not None:
                return UserResponse(
                    status_code=data["error"].get("code", -1),
                    error_message=data["error"].get(
                        "message", "Unknown error, please check server logs"
                    ),
                )

            # Standard OpenAI API streams include "finish_reason"
            # in the second-to-last chunk,
            # followed by "usage" in the final chunk,
            # which does not contain "finish_reason"
            if (
                not data["choices"]
                and finish_reason
                and "usage" in data
                and data["usage"]
            ):
                (
                    num_prefill_tokens,
                    num_prompt_tokens,
                    tokens_received,
                    reasoning_tokens,
                ) = self._get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens)
                # Additional check for time_at_first_token when the response is
                # too short
                if not time_at_first_token:
                    tokens_received = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens", 0)
                    if tokens_received > 1:
                        logger.warning(
                            f"🚨🚨🚨 The first chunk the server returned "
                            f"has >1 tokens: {tokens_received}. It will "
                            f"affect the accuracy of time_at_first_token!"
                        )
                        time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
                    else:
                        raise Exception(
                            "Invalid streaming response: "
                            "received final usage chunk "
                            "with completion_tokens="
                            f"{tokens_received}, but no "
                            "content was delivered during "
                            "streaming (time_at_first_token"
                            " was never set). This typically"
                            " means the model returned an "
                            "empty response. Raw usage "
                            f"data: {data.get('usage')}"
                        )
                break

            try:
                delta = data["choices"][0]["delta"]
                content = delta.get("content")
                reasoning_content_chunk = self._get_reasoning_content_chunk(delta)
                content = content or reasoning_content_chunk
                usage = delta.get("usage")

                if usage:
                    tokens_received = usage["completion_tokens"]
                if content:
                    if not time_at_first_token:
                        if tokens_received > 1:
                            logger.warning(
                                f"🚨🚨🚨 The first chunk the server returned "
                                f"has >1 tokens: {tokens_received}. It will "
                                f"affect the accuracy of time_at_first_token!"
                            )
                        time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
                    generated_text += content
                if reasoning_content_chunk:
                    reasoning_text += reasoning_content_chunk

                finish_reason = data["choices"][0].get("finish_reason", None)

                # SGLang v0.4.3 to v0.4.7 has finish_reason and usage
                # in the last chunk
                if finish_reason and "usage" in data and data["usage"]:
                    (
                        num_prefill_tokens,
                        num_prompt_tokens,
                        tokens_received,
                        reasoning_tokens,
                    ) = self._get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens)
                    break

            except (IndexError, KeyError) as e:
                logger.warning(
                    f"Error processing chunk: {e}, data: {data}, "
                    f"previous_data: {previous_data}, "
                    f"finish_reason: {finish_reason}, skipping"
                )

            previous_data = data

        end_time = time.monotonic()
        logger.debug(
            f"Generated text: {generated_text} \n"
            f"Time at first token: {time_at_first_token} \n"
            f"Finish reason: {finish_reason}\n"
            f"Prompt Tokens: {num_prompt_tokens} \n"
            f"Completion Tokens: {tokens_received}\n"
            f"Start Time: {start_time}\n"
            f"End Time: {end_time}"
        )

        if not tokens_received:
            tokens_received = self.environment.sampler.get_token_length(
                generated_text, add_special_tokens=False
            )
            warning_once(
                logger,
                "tokens_received_estimated",
                "🚨🚨🚨 There is no usage info returned from the model "
                "server. Estimated tokens_received based on the model "
                "tokenizer.",
            )
        # If reasoning_tokens is not provided by the server,
        # fall back to estimating it from reasoning_content.
        if (not reasoning_tokens) and len(reasoning_text) > 0:
            reasoning_tokens = self.environment.sampler.get_token_length(
                reasoning_text, add_special_tokens=False
            )
            warning_once(
                logger,
                "reasoning_tokens_estimated",
                "🚨🚨🚨 Server did not report reasoning_tokens. Estimated "
                "reasoning_tokens based on the model tokenizer.",
            )
        return UserChatResponse(
            status_code=200,
            generated_text=generated_text,
            tokens_received=tokens_received,
            time_at_first_token=time_at_first_token,
            num_prefill_tokens=num_prefill_tokens,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens,
        )

    @staticmethod
    def _get_usage_info(data, num_prefill_tokens):
        num_prompt_tokens = data["usage"].get("prompt_tokens")
        tokens_received = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens", 0)
        details = data["usage"].get("completion_tokens_details") or {}
        reasoning_tokens = details.get("reasoning_tokens")
        # For vision task
        if num_prefill_tokens is None:
            # use num_prompt_tokens as prefill to cover image tokens
            num_prefill_tokens = num_prompt_tokens
        # Prefer server-reported prompt token count, fall back to local
        effective_prefill = (
            num_prompt_tokens if num_prompt_tokens is not None else num_prefill_tokens
        )
        return effective_prefill, num_prompt_tokens, tokens_received, reasoning_tokens

    @staticmethod
    def parse_embedding_response(
        response: Response, start_time: float, _: Optional[int], end_time: float
    ) -> UserResponse:
        """
        Parses a non-streaming response.

        Args:
            response (Response): The response object.
            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
            _ (Optional[int]): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep
                parse_*_response have the same interface.
            end_time(float): The time when the request was finished.

        Returns:
            UserResponse: A response object with metrics.
        """

        data = response.json()
        num_prompt_tokens = data["usage"]["prompt_tokens"]

        return UserResponse(
            status_code=200,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            time_at_first_token=end_time,
            num_prefill_tokens=num_prompt_tokens,
        )

    @staticmethod
    def parse_rerank_response(
        response: Response,
        start_time: float,
        num_prefill_tokens: Optional[int],
        end_time: float,
    ) -> UserResponse:
        """
        Parses a rerank response from vLLM/SGLang backends.

        Args:
            response (Response): The response object.
            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
            num_prefill_tokens (Optional[int]): Number of tokens in the request.
            end_time (float): The time when the request was finished.

        Returns:
            UserResponse: A response object with metrics.
        """
        data = response.json()

        if "usage" in data and data["usage"]:
            num_prefill_tokens, _, _, _ = OpenAIUser._get_usage_info(
                data, num_prefill_tokens
            )

        return UserResponse(
            status_code=200,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            time_at_first_token=end_time,
            num_prefill_tokens=num_prefill_tokens or 0,
        )

    @staticmethod
    def parse_images_generations_response(
        response: Response, start_time: float, _: Optional[int], end_time: float
    ) -> UserImageGenerationResponse:
        """
        Parses an image generation response.

        Args:
            response (Response): The response object.
            start_time (float): The time when the request was started.
            _ (Optional[int]): Placeholder for an unused var, to keep
                parse_*_response have the same interface.
            end_time(float): The time when the request was finished.

        Returns:
            UserImageGenerationResponse: A response object with generated images.
        """

        data = response.json()
        image_data = data.get("data", [])
        generated_images = [
            img.get("url") or img.get("b64_json", "") for img in image_data
        ]
        revised_prompt = image_data[0].get("revised_prompt") if image_data else None

        return UserImageGenerationResponse(
            status_code=response.status_code,
            start_time=start_time,
            end_time=end_time,
            time_at_first_token=end_time,
            generated_images=generated_images,
            revised_prompt=revised_prompt,
            num_prefill_tokens=0,
            images_generated=len(generated_images),
        )

1	"""User class for OCI's OpenAI-compatible endpoints."""

28	    "oci_security_token": OciSessionAuth,

35	class OCIOpenAIUser(OpenAIUser):
36	    """User class for OCI's OpenAI-compatible endpoints."""
37	
38	    BACKEND_NAME = "oci-openai"
39	    supported_tasks = {
40	        "text-to-image": "images_generations",
41	        "text-to-speech": "speech",
42	    }
43	
44	    def on_start(self):
45	        if not self.host or not self.auth_provider:
46	            raise ValueError("Host and Auth is required for OCIOpenAIUser.")
47	        auth_type = self.auth_provider.get_auth_type()
48	        auth_cls = OCI_AUTH_CLASS_MAP.get(auth_type)
49	        if auth_cls is None:
50	            raise ValueError(
51	                f"Unsupported OCI auth type: {auth_type}. "
52	                f"Supported: {list(OCI_AUTH_CLASS_MAP)}"
53	            )
54	
55	        if auth_type in ("oci_security_token", "oci_user_principal"):
56	            profile = getattr(self.auth_provider.oci_auth, "profile", "DEFAULT")
57	            config_file = getattr(self.auth_provider.oci_auth, "config_path", None)
58	            kwargs = {"profile_name": profile}
59	            if config_file:
60	                kwargs["config_file"] = config_file
61	            oci_auth = auth_cls(**kwargs)
62	        else:
63	            oci_auth = auth_cls()
64	
65	        self.openai_client = OpenAI(
66	            api_key="OCI",
67	            base_url=self.host,
68	            http_client=httpx.Client(auth=oci_auth),
69	        )
70	        self.api_backend = getattr(self, "api_backend", self.BACKEND_NAME)
71	        super(OpenAIUser, self).on_start()
72	
73	    @task
74	    def images_generations(self):
75	        user_request = self.sample()
76	
77	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserImageGenerationRequest):
78	            raise AttributeError(
79	                f"user_request should be of type "
80	                f"UserImageGenerationRequest for OCIOpenAIUser."
81	                f"images_generations, got {type(user_request)}"
82	            )
83	
84	        compartment_id = user_request.additional_request_params.get("compartmentId")
85	        if not compartment_id:
86	            raise ValueError("compartmentId missing in additional request params")
87	
88	        start_time = time.monotonic()
89	        try:
90	            # Filter out keys already passed as explicit SDK args
91	            sdk_params = {
92	                k: v
93	                for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
94	                if k not in ("compartmentId", "model", "prompt", "n", "size")
95	            }
96	
97	            response = self.openai_client.images.generate(
98	                model=user_request.model,
99	                prompt=user_request.prompt,
100	                n=user_request.num_images,
101	                size=user_request.size,
102	                extra_headers={"CompartmentId": compartment_id},
103	                **sdk_params,
104	            )
105	
106	            end_time = time.monotonic()
107	            generated_images = [img.url or img.b64_json for img in response.data if img]
108	            revised_prompt = response.data[0].revised_prompt if response.data else None
109	
110	            metrics_response = UserImageGenerationResponse(
111	                status_code=200,
112	                start_time=start_time,
113	                end_time=end_time,
114	                time_at_first_token=end_time,
115	                generated_images=generated_images,
116	                revised_prompt=revised_prompt,
117	                num_prefill_tokens=0,
118	                images_generated=len(generated_images),
119	            )
120	
121	        except Exception as e:
122	            logger.error(f"OCI image generation failed: {e}")
123	            metrics_response = UserImageGenerationResponse(
124	                status_code=getattr(e, "status_code", 500),
125	                error_message=str(e),
126	                start_time=start_time,
127	                end_time=time.monotonic(),
128	                time_at_first_token=None,
129	                generated_images=[],
130	                revised_prompt=None,
131	                num_prefill_tokens=0,
132	                images_generated=0,
133	            )
134	
135	        self.collect_metrics(metrics_response, "/v1/images/generations")
136	        return metrics_response
137	
138	    @task
139	    def speech(self):
140	        user_request = self.sample()
141	
142	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserTextToSpeechRequest):
143	            raise AttributeError(
144	                f"user_request should be of type "
145	                f"UserTextToSpeechRequest for OCIOpenAIUser.speech, got "
146	                f"{type(user_request)}"
147	            )
148

"""User class for OCI's OpenAI-compatible endpoints."""

from locust import task

import time

import httpx
from oci_openai import (
    OciInstancePrincipalAuth,
    OciResourcePrincipalAuth,
    OciSessionAuth,
    OciUserPrincipalAuth,
)
from openai import OpenAI

from genai_bench.logging import init_logger
from genai_bench.protocol import (
    UserImageGenerationRequest,
    UserImageGenerationResponse,
    UserTextToSpeechRequest,
    UserTextToSpeechResponse,
)
from genai_bench.user.openai_user import OpenAIUser

logger = init_logger(__name__)

OCI_AUTH_CLASS_MAP = {
    "oci_security_token": OciSessionAuth,
    "oci_user_principal": OciUserPrincipalAuth,
    "oci_instance_principal": OciInstancePrincipalAuth,
    "oci_obo_token": OciResourcePrincipalAuth,
}


class OCIOpenAIUser(OpenAIUser):
    """User class for OCI's OpenAI-compatible endpoints."""

    BACKEND_NAME = "oci-openai"
    supported_tasks = {
        "text-to-image": "images_generations",
        "text-to-speech": "speech",
    }

    def on_start(self):
        if not self.host or not self.auth_provider:
            raise ValueError("Host and Auth is required for OCIOpenAIUser.")
        auth_type = self.auth_provider.get_auth_type()
        auth_cls = OCI_AUTH_CLASS_MAP.get(auth_type)
        if auth_cls is None:
            raise ValueError(
                f"Unsupported OCI auth type: {auth_type}. "
                f"Supported: {list(OCI_AUTH_CLASS_MAP)}"
            )

        if auth_type in ("oci_security_token", "oci_user_principal"):
            profile = getattr(self.auth_provider.oci_auth, "profile", "DEFAULT")
            config_file = getattr(self.auth_provider.oci_auth, "config_path", None)
            kwargs = {"profile_name": profile}
            if config_file:
                kwargs["config_file"] = config_file
            oci_auth = auth_cls(**kwargs)
        else:
            oci_auth = auth_cls()

        self.openai_client = OpenAI(
            api_key="OCI",
            base_url=self.host,
            http_client=httpx.Client(auth=oci_auth),
        )
        self.api_backend = getattr(self, "api_backend", self.BACKEND_NAME)
        super(OpenAIUser, self).on_start()

    @task
    def images_generations(self):
        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserImageGenerationRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserImageGenerationRequest for OCIOpenAIUser."
                f"images_generations, got {type(user_request)}"
            )

        compartment_id = user_request.additional_request_params.get("compartmentId")
        if not compartment_id:
            raise ValueError("compartmentId missing in additional request params")

        start_time = time.monotonic()
        try:
            # Filter out keys already passed as explicit SDK args
            sdk_params = {
                k: v
                for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
                if k not in ("compartmentId", "model", "prompt", "n", "size")
            }

            response = self.openai_client.images.generate(
                model=user_request.model,
                prompt=user_request.prompt,
                n=user_request.num_images,
                size=user_request.size,
                extra_headers={"CompartmentId": compartment_id},
                **sdk_params,
            )

            end_time = time.monotonic()
            generated_images = [img.url or img.b64_json for img in response.data if img]
            revised_prompt = response.data[0].revised_prompt if response.data else None

            metrics_response = UserImageGenerationResponse(
                status_code=200,
                start_time=start_time,
                end_time=end_time,
                time_at_first_token=end_time,
                generated_images=generated_images,
                revised_prompt=revised_prompt,
                num_prefill_tokens=0,
                images_generated=len(generated_images),
            )

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"OCI image generation failed: {e}")
            metrics_response = UserImageGenerationResponse(
                status_code=getattr(e, "status_code", 500),
                error_message=str(e),
                start_time=start_time,
                end_time=time.monotonic(),
                time_at_first_token=None,
                generated_images=[],
                revised_prompt=None,
                num_prefill_tokens=0,
                images_generated=0,
            )

        self.collect_metrics(metrics_response, "/v1/images/generations")
        return metrics_response

    @task
    def speech(self):
        user_request = self.sample()

        if not isinstance(user_request, UserTextToSpeechRequest):
            raise AttributeError(
                f"user_request should be of type "
                f"UserTextToSpeechRequest for OCIOpenAIUser.speech, got "
                f"{type(user_request)}"
            )

        compartment_id = user_request.additional_request_params.get("compartmentId")
        if not compartment_id:
            raise ValueError("compartmentId missing in additional request params")

        filtered_params = {
            k: v
            for k, v in user_request.additional_request_params.items()
            if k not in ("compartmentId", "model", "input", "voice")
        }

        start_time = time.monotonic()
        try:
            with self.openai_client.audio.speech.with_streaming_response.create(
                model=user_request.model,
                voice=user_request.voice,
                input=user_request.input_text,
                extra_headers={"CompartmentId": compartment_id},
                **filtered_params,
            ) as response:
                time_at_first_token = None
                total_bytes = 0
                for chunk in response.iter_bytes(1024):
                    if time_at_first_token is None:
                        time_at_first_token = time.monotonic()
                    total_bytes += len(chunk)
                end_time = time.monotonic()

            if time_at_first_token is None:
                logger.warning("TTS response returned 200 but empty audio body")
                time_at_first_token = end_time

            logger.debug(
                f"TTS response: audio_bytes={total_bytes}, "
                f"ttft={time_at_first_token - start_time:.3f}s, "
                f"e2e_latency={end_time - start_time:.3f}s"
            )

            metrics_response = UserTextToSpeechResponse(
                status_code=200,
                start_time=start_time,
                end_time=end_time,
                time_at_first_token=time_at_first_token,
                num_prefill_tokens=0,
                audio_bytes=total_bytes,
            )

        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"OCI TTS failed: {e}")
            metrics_response = UserTextToSpeechResponse(
                status_code=getattr(e, "status_code", 500),
                error_message=str(e),
            )

        self.collect_metrics(metrics_response, "/v1/audio/speech")
        return metrics_response

1	"""AWS Bedrock user implementation."""
2	
3	from locust import task
4	
5	import json
6	import time
7	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional
8	
9	from genai_bench.logging import init_logger
10	from genai_bench.protocol import (
11	    UserChatRequest,
12	    UserChatResponse,
13	    UserEmbeddingRequest,
14	    UserImageChatRequest,
15	    UserResponse,
16	)
17	from genai_bench.user.base_user import BaseUser
18	
19	logger = init_logger(__name__)
20	
21	
22	class AWSBedrockUser(BaseUser):
23	    """AWS Bedrock API user implementation."""
24	
25	    BACKEND_NAME = "aws-bedrock"
26	
27	    # Task mapping
28	    supported_tasks = {
29	        "text-to-text": "chat",
30	        "text-to-embeddings": "embeddings",
31	        "image-text-to-text": "chat",  # Same method handles both text and image
32	    }
33	
34	    host: Optional[str] = None
35	    auth_provider = None
36	    runtime_client = None
37	
38	    def on_start(self):
39	        """Initialize AWS Bedrock client using auth provider credentials."""
40	        if not self.auth_provider:
41	            raise ValueError("Auth provider not set for AWS Bedrock")
42	
43	        try:
44	            import boto3
45	            from botocore.config import Config
46	        except ImportError as e:
47	            raise ImportError(
48	                "boto3 is required for AWS Bedrock. Install it with: pip install boto3"
49	            ) from e
50	
51	        # Get credentials from auth provider
52	        creds = self.auth_provider.get_credentials()
53	
54	        # Create session with credentials
55	        session_kwargs = {}
56	        if creds.get("profile_name"):
57	            session_kwargs["profile_name"] = creds["profile_name"]
58	        else:
59	            if creds.get("aws_access_key_id"):
60	                session_kwargs["aws_access_key_id"] = creds["aws_access_key_id"]
61	            if creds.get("aws_secret_access_key"):
62	                session_kwargs["aws_secret_access_key"] = creds["aws_secret_access_key"]
63	            if creds.get("aws_session_token"):
64	                session_kwargs["aws_session_token"] = creds["aws_session_token"]
65	
66	        session = boto3.Session(**session_kwargs)
67	
68	        # Create Bedrock runtime client
69	        region = creds.get("region_name", "us-east-1")
70	        config = Config(region_name=region)
71	
72	        self.runtime_client = session.client(
73	            service_name="bedrock-runtime", config=config
74	        )
75	
76	        logger.info(f"Initialized AWS Bedrock client in region {region}")
77	
78	    @task
79	    def chat(self):
80	        """Perform a chat request to AWS Bedrock."""
81	        # Get request using sample method
82	        user_request = self.sample()
83	
84	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserChatRequest):
85	            raise AttributeError(
86	                "user_request should be of type UserChatRequest for "
87	                f"AWSBedrockUser.chat, got {type(user_request)}"
88	            )
89	
90	        # Prepare request body based on model
91	        model_id = user_request.model
92	        request_body = self._prepare_request_body(user_request, model_id)
93	
94	        # Track timing
95	        start_time = time.monotonic()
96	        first_token_time = None
97	        reasoning_tokens = None
98	
99	        try:
100	            # Determine if streaming
101	            use_streaming = user_request.additional_request_params.get(
102	                "stream", True
103	            ) and self._supports_streaming(model_id)
104	
105	            if use_streaming:
106	                # Streaming request
107	                response = self.runtime_client.invoke_model_with_response_stream(
108	                    modelId=model_id,
109	                    body=json.dumps(request_body),
110	                    contentType="application/json",
111	                    accept="application/json",
112	                )
113	
114	                # Process streaming response
115	                full_response = ""
116	                for event in response["body"]:
117	                    chunk = json.loads(event["chunk"]["bytes"])
118	
119	                    if first_token_time is None:
120	                        first_token_time = time.monotonic()
121	
122	                    # Extract text based on model type
123	                    chunk_text = self._extract_chunk_text(chunk, model_id)
124	                    if chunk_text:
125	                        full_response += chunk_text
126	                    reasoning_tokens = self._extract_usage_reasoning(chunk, model_id)
127	                response_text = full_response
128	
129	            else:
130	                # Non-streaming request
131	                response = self.runtime_client.invoke_model(
132	                    modelId=model_id,
133	                    body=json.dumps(request_body),
134	                    contentType="application/json",
135	                    accept="application/json",
136	                )
137	
138	                # Parse response
139	                response_body = json.loads(response["body"].read())
140	                first_token_time = time.monotonic()
141	
142	                # Extract response text based on model type
143	                response_text = self._extract_response_text(response_body, model_id)
144	                if reasoning_tokens is None:
145	                    reasoning_tokens = self._extract_usage_reasoning(
146	                        response_body, model_id
147	                    )
148	
149	            end_time = time.monotonic()
150	            if reasoning_tokens is None:
151	                reasoning_tokens = 0
152	
153	            # Create response
154	            user_response = UserChatResponse(
155	                status_code=200,
156	                generated_text=response_text,
157	                tokens_received=len(response_text.split()),  # Approximate token count
158	                reasoning_tokens=reasoning_tokens,
159	                time_at_first_token=first_token_time,
160	                num_prefill_tokens=user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
161	                start_time=start_time,
162	                end_time=end_time,
163	            )
164	
165	            # Collect metrics
166	            self.collect_metrics(user_response, "/bedrock/chat")
167	
168	        except Exception as e:
169	            logger.error(f"AWS Bedrock request failed: {e}")
170	            user_response = UserResponse(
171	                status_code=500,
172	                error_message=str(e),
173	            )
174	            self.collect_metrics(user_response, "/bedrock/chat")
175	
176	    @task
177	    def embeddings(self):
178	        """Perform an embeddings request to AWS Bedrock."""
179	        # Get request using sample method
180	        user_request = self.sample()
181	
182	        if not isinstance(user_request, UserEmbeddingRequest):
183	            raise AttributeError(
184	                "user_request should be of type UserEmbeddingRequest for "
185	                f"AWSBedrockUser.embeddings, got {type(user_request)}"
186	            )
187	
188	        # Only Titan embeddings models are supported
189	        model_id = user_request.model
190	        if "titan-embed" not in model_id.lower():
191	            logger.error(f"Model {model_id} does not support embeddings")
192	            user_response = UserResponse(
193	                status_code=400,
194	                error_message=f"Model {model_id} does not support embeddings",
195	            )
196	            self.collect_metrics(user_response, "/bedrock/embeddings")
197	            return
198	
199	        # Prepare request body
200	        # For embeddings, join all documents into a single text
201	        input_text = " ".join(user_request.documents)
202	        request_body = {"inputText": input_text}
203	
204	        # Track timing
205	        start_time = time.monotonic()
206	
207	        try:
208	            # Invoke model
209	            response = self.runtime_client.invoke_model(
210	                modelId=model_id,
211	                body=json.dumps(request_body),
212	                contentType="application/json",
213	                accept="application/json",
214	            )
215	
216	            # Parse response (embeddings are not extracted for now)
217	            json.loads(response["body"].read())
218	            end_time = time.monotonic()
219	
220	            # Create response
221	            user_response = UserResponse(
222	                status_code=200,
223	                start_time=start_time,
224	                time_at_first_token=end_time,  # No streaming for embeddings
225	                end_time=end_time,
226	                num_prefill_tokens=user_request.num_prefill_tokens,
227	            )
228	
229	            # Collect metrics
230	            self.collect_metrics(user_response, "/bedrock/embeddings")
231	
232	        except Exception as e:
233	            logger.error(f"AWS Bedrock embeddings request failed: {e}")
234	            user_response = UserResponse(
235	                status_code=500,
236	                error_message=str(e),
237	            )
238	            self.collect_metrics(user_response, "/bedrock/embeddings")
239	
240	    def _prepare_request_body(
241	        self, request: UserChatRequest, model_id: str
242	    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
243	        """Prepare request body based on model type.
244	
245	        Args:
246	            request: User request
247	            model_id: Model ID
248	
249	        Returns:
250	            Request body dict
251	        """
252	        # Handle different model families
253	        body: Dict[str, Any]
254	        if "claude" in model_id.lower():
255	            # Anthropic Claude models
256	            body = {
257	                "anthropic_version": "bedrock-2023-05-31",
258	                "messages": [],
259	                "max_tokens": request.max_tokens or 1000,
260	            }
261	
262	            # Add messages
263	            if isinstance(request, UserImageChatRequest) and request.image_content:
264	                # Multimodal request
265	                content: List[Dict[str, Any]] = [
266	                    {"type": "text", "text": request.prompt}
267	                ]
268	                for image in request.image_content:
269	                    # Handle different image formats for Bedrock
270	                    if image.startswith("data:image/"):
271	                        # Extract base64 data from data URL
272	                        image_data = image.split(",", 1)[1]
273	                    elif image.startswith(("http://", "https://")):
274	                        # Bedrock doesn't support HTTP URLs - should be converted in
275	                        # data loading phase
276	                        raise ValueError(
277	                            f"AWS Bedrock does not support HTTP URLs for images. "
278	                            f"URL '{image}' should be processed during data loading."
279	                        )
280	
281	                    source_data: Dict[str, str] = {
282	                        "type": "base64",
283	                        "media_type": "image/jpeg",  # Assume JPEG
284	                        "data": image_data,
285	                    }
286	                    content.append({"type": "image", "source": source_data})
287	                body["messages"].append({"role": "user", "content": content})
288	            else:
289	                # Text-only request
290	                body["messages"].append({"role": "user", "content": request.prompt})
291	
292	            # Add additional params
293	            if request.additional_request_params.get("temperature") is not None:
294	                body["temperature"] = request.additional_request_params["temperature"]
295	            if request.additional_request_params.get("top_p") is not None:
296	                body["top_p"] = request.additional_request_params["top_p"]
297	
298	        elif "titan" in model_id.lower():
299	            # Amazon Titan models
300	            body = {
301	                "inputText": request.prompt,
302	                "textGenerationConfig": {
303	                    "maxTokenCount": request.max_tokens or 1000,
304	                },
305	            }
306	
307	            if request.additional_request_params.get("temperature") is not None:
308	                body["textGenerationConfig"]["temperature"] = (
309	                    request.additional_request_params["temperature"]
310	                )
311	            if request.additional_request_params.get("top_p") is not None:
312	                body["textGenerationConfig"]["topP"] = (
313	                    request.additional_request_params["top_p"]
314	                )
315	
316	        elif "llama" in model_id.lower():
317	            # Meta Llama models
318	            body = {
319	                "prompt": request.prompt,
320	                "max_gen_len": request.max_tokens or 1000,
321	            }
322	
323	            if request.additional_request_params.get("temperature") is not None:
324	                body["temperature"] = request.additional_request_params["temperature"]
325	            if request.additional_request_params.get("top_p") is not None:
326	                body["top_p"] = request.additional_request_params["top_p"]
327	
328	        else:
329	            # Generic format
330	            body = {
331	                "prompt": request.prompt,
332	                "max_tokens": request.max_tokens or 1000,
333	            }
334	
335	            if request.additional_request_params.get("temperature") is not None:
336	                body["temperature"] = request.additional_request_params["temperature"]
337	            if request.additional_request_params.get("top_p") is not None:
338	                body["top_p"] = request.additional_request_params["top_p"]
339	
340	        # Add any additional params
341	        body.update(request.additional_request_params)
342	
343	        return body
344	
345	    def _supports_streaming(self, model_id: str) -> bool:
346	        """Check if model supports streaming.
347	
348	        Args:
349	            model_id: Model ID
350	
351	        Returns:
352	            True if streaming is supported
353	        """
354	        # Most models support streaming except embeddings
355	        return "embed" not in model_id.lower()
356	
357	    def _extract_chunk_text(self, chunk: Dict[str, Any], model_id: str) -> str:
358	        """Extract text from streaming chunk based on model type.
359	
360	        Args:
361	            chunk: Streaming chunk
362	            model_id: Model ID
363	
364	        Returns:
365	            Extracted text
366	        """
367	        if "claude" in model_id.lower():
368	            # Claude models
369	            if chunk.get("type") == "content_block_delta":
370	                return chunk.get("delta", {}).get("text", "")
371	        elif "titan" in model_id.lower():
372	            # Titan models
373	            return chunk.get("outputText", "")
374	        elif "llama" in model_id.lower():
375	            # Llama models
376	            return chunk.get("generation", "")
377	
378	        # Try common fields
379	        return chunk.get("text", chunk.get("output", ""))
380	
381	    def _extract_usage_reasoning(self, chunk: Dict[str, Any], model_id: str) -> int:
382	        """Extract reasoning tokens from streaming chunk if available.
383	
384	        Args:
385	            chunk: Streaming chunk
386	            model_id: Model ID
387	        Returns:
388	            Reasoning tokens count if available, otherwise 0
389	        """
390	        if "openai" in model_id.lower():
391	            # OpenAI models may include reasoning tokens in usage details
392	            usage = chunk.get("usage", {})
393	            details = usage.get("completion_tokens_details", {})
394	            return details.get("reasoning_tokens")
395	
396	        return None
397	
398	    def _extract_response_text(self, response: Dict[str, Any], model_id: str) -> str:
399	        """Extract response text based on model type.
400	
401	        Args:
402	            response: Response body
403	            model_id: Model ID
404	
405	        Returns:
406	            Extracted text
407	        """
408	        if "claude" in model_id.lower():
409	            # Claude models
410	            content = response.get("content", [])
411	            if content and isinstance(content, list):
412	                return content[0].get("text", "")
413	        elif "titan" in model_id.lower():
414	            # Titan models
415	            results = response.get("results", [])
416	            if results:
417	                return results[0].get("outputText", "")
418	        elif "llama" in model_id.lower():
419	            # Llama models
420	            return response.get("generation", "")
421	
422	        # Try common fields
423	        return response.get(
424	            "text", response.get("output", response.get("completion", ""))
425	        )
426
